mapper.select: SELECT A1.ITEM_ID AS itemId, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM), '') AS userNm, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ZIP), '') AS zip, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ADRES_LOT), '') AS adresLot, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ADRES), '') AS adres, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.DETAIL_ADRES), '') AS detailAdres, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.USR_TELNO), '') AS usrTelno FROM ARTITEM A1 WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT A1.ITEM_ID AS itemId, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM), '') AS userNm, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ZIP), '') AS zip, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ADRES_LOT), '') AS adresLot, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.ADRES), '') AS adres, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.DETAIL_ADRES), '') AS detailAdres, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A1.USR_TELNO), '') AS usrTelno FROM ARTITEM A1 WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT A1.SEQ AS seq, COALESCE(A1.PAY_STA, '') AS paySta, COALESCE(A1.TYPE_1, '') AS type1, COALESCE(A1.TYPE_2, '') AS type2, DATE_FORMAT(A1.REQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reqDate, COALESCE(A1.BASE_COST, 0) AS baseCost, COALESCE(A1.WATER_SUM, 0) AS waterSum, COALESCE(A1.WATER_VAL, 0) AS waterVal, COALESCE(A1.WATER_COST, 0) AS waterCost, COALESCE(A1.WATER_PAY, 0) AS waterPay FROM ARTITED A1 WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY A1.SEQ ASC

SELECT A1.SEQ AS seq, A1.SEQ2 AS seq2, COALESCE(A1.FLOOR, 0) AS floor, COALESCE(A1.BUILD_ID, '') AS buildId, COALESCE(B1.BUILD_NM, '') AS buildNm, COALESCE(A1.ROOM_CNT, 0) AS roomCnt, COALESCE(A1.HOME_CNT, 0) AS homeCnt, COALESCE(A1.BUILD_SIZE, 0) AS buildSize, COALESCE(A1.DAY_VAL, 0) AS dayVal, COALESCE(A1.COST_YN, '') AS costYn, COALESCE(A1.WATER_VOL, 0) AS waterVol FROM ARTITEC A1 LEFT JOIN ARMBULD B1 ON B1.BUILD_ID = A1.BUILD_ID WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY A1.SEQ ASC, A1.SEQ2 ASC

SELECT A1.SEQ AS seq, COALESCE(A1.PAY_STA, '') AS paySta, COALESCE(A1.TYPE_1, '') AS type1, COALESCE(A1.TYPE_2, '') AS type2, DATE_FORMAT(A1.REQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reqDate, COALESCE(A1.BASE_COST, 0) AS baseCost, COALESCE(A1.WATER_SUM, 0) AS waterSum, COALESCE(A1.WATER_VAL, 0) AS waterVal, COALESCE(A1.WATER_COST, 0) AS waterCost, COALESCE(A1.WATER_PAY, 0) AS waterPay, A2.SEQ2 AS seq2, DATE_FORMAT(A2.PAY_DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') AS payDay, COALESCE(A2.PAY, 0) AS pay, COALESCE(A2.PAY_DESC, '') AS payDesc FROM ARTITED A1 LEFT JOIN ARTITEP A2 ON A2.ITEM_ID = A1.ITEM_ID AND A2.SEQ = A1.SEQ WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY A1.SEQ ASC, A2.SEQ2 ASC

SELECT A1.ITEM_ID AS itemId, A1.SEQ AS seq, COALESCE(A1.PAY_STA, '') AS paySta, DATE_FORMAT(A1.REQ_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reqDate, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.USER_NM), '') AS userNm, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.ZIP), '') AS zip, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.ADRES_LOT), '') AS adresLot, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.ADRES), '') AS adres, COALESCE(DECRYPT(A2.DETAIL_ADRES), '') AS detailAdres, COALESCE(A1.WATER_SUM, 0) AS waterSum, COALESCE(A1.WATER_COST, 0) AS waterCost, COALESCE(A1.WATER_VAL, 0) AS waterVal, COALESCE(A1.WATER_PAY, 0) AS waterPay, ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(P1.PAY_DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') FROM ARTITEP P1 WHERE P1.ITEM_ID = A1.ITEM_ID AND P1.SEQ = A1.SEQ ORDER BY P1.PAY_DAY DESC, P1.SEQ2 DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS payDay, COALESCE(( SELECT P2.PAY FROM ARTITEP P2 WHERE P2.ITEM_ID = A1.ITEM_ID AND P2.SEQ = A1.SEQ ORDER BY P2.PAY_DAY DESC, P2.SEQ2 DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS pay FROM ARTITED A1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_ID, MAX(SEQ) AS MAX_SEQ FROM ARTITED GROUP BY ITEM_ID ) AL ON AL.ITEM_ID = A1.ITEM_ID AND AL.MAX_SEQ = A1.SEQ JOIN ARTITEM A2 ON A2.ITEM_ID = A1.ITEM_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A1.REQ_DATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#{reqDateFrom}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A1.REQ_DATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#{reqDateTo}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DECRYPT(A2.USER_NM) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNm}, '%')
AND ( DECRYPT(A2.ZIP) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%') OR DECRYPT(A2.ADRES_LOT) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%') OR DECRYPT(A2.ADRES) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%') OR DECRYPT(A2.DETAIL_ADRES) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{address}, '%') )
ORDER BY A1.REQ_DATE DESC, A1.ITEM_ID DESC, A1.SEQ DESC
SELECT CONCAT('ITM_', LPAD(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(A1.ITEM_ID), 5, 16), 0) + 1, 16, '0')) AS ITEM_ID FROM ARTITEM A1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTITEM ( ITEM_ID, USER_NM, ZIP, ADRES_LOT, ADRES, DETAIL_ADRES, USR_TELNO, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, ENCRYPT(#{userNm}), ENCRYPT(#{zip}), ENCRYPT(#{adresLot}), ENCRYPT(#{adres}), ENCRYPT(#{detailAdres}), ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{usrTelno}, '-', '')), #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTITEM SET USER_NM = ENCRYPT(#{userNm}), ZIP = ENCRYPT(#{zip}), ADRES_LOT = ENCRYPT(#{adresLot}), ADRES = ENCRYPT(#{adres}), DETAIL_ADRES = ENCRYPT(#{detailAdres}), USR_TELNO = ENCRYPT(REPLACE(#{usrTelno}, '-', '')), CHG_USER_ID = #{chgUserId}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT A1.SEQ FROM ARTITED A1 WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY A1.SEQ ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ARTITED A1 WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter} AND A1.PAY_STA = '01'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTITED ( ITEM_ID, SEQ, PAY_STA, TYPE_1, TYPE_2, REQ_DATE, BASE_COST, WATER_SUM, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{seq}, #{paySta}, #{type1}, #{type2}, #{reqDate}, #{baseCost}, #{waterSum}, #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO ARTITED ( ITEM_ID, SEQ, PAY_STA, TYPE_1, TYPE_2, REQ_DATE, BASE_COST, WATER_SUM, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{seq}, #{paySta}, #{type1}, #{type2}, #{reqDate}, #{baseCost}, #{waterSum}, #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PAY_STA = VALUES(PAY_STA), TYPE_1 = VALUES(TYPE_1), TYPE_2 = VALUES(TYPE_2), REQ_DATE = VALUES(REQ_DATE), BASE_COST = VALUES(BASE_COST), WATER_SUM = VALUES(WATER_SUM), CHG_USER_ID = VALUES(CHG_USER_ID), CHG_DATE = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTITEC SET FLOOR = #{floor}, BUILD_ID = #{buildId}, ROOM_CNT = #{roomCnt}, HOME_CNT = #{homeCnt}, BUILD_SIZE = #{buildSize}, DAY_VAL = #{dayVal}, COST_YN = #{costYn}, WATER_VOL = #{waterVol}, CHG_USER_ID = #{chgUserId}, CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId} AND SEQ = #{seq} AND SEQ2 = #{seq2}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTITEC ( ITEM_ID, SEQ, SEQ2, FLOOR, BUILD_ID, ROOM_CNT, HOME_CNT, BUILD_SIZE, DAY_VAL, COST_YN, WATER_VOL, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{seq}, #{seq2}, #{floor}, #{buildId}, #{roomCnt}, #{homeCnt}, #{buildSize}, #{dayVal}, #{costYn}, #{waterVol}, #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
INSERT INTO ARTITEP ( ITEM_ID, SEQ, SEQ2, PAY_DAY, PAY, PAY_DESC, CHG_USER_ID, CRT_DATE, CHG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{seq}, #{seq2}, #{payDay}, #{pay}, #{payDesc}, #{chgUserId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTITED A1 SET A1.WATER_PAY = ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(P1.PAY, 0)), 0) FROM ARTITEP P1 WHERE P1.ITEM_ID = A1.ITEM_ID AND P1.SEQ = A1.SEQ ), A1.CHG_DATE = NOW() WHERE A1.ITEM_ID = #{_parameter}
